chapter_title.en: Visiting a Believer Socially and When He is Ill

parts.text: عن النبي صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم أنه قال

text: : أيما مؤمن عاد مريضا في الله عز وجل خاض في الرحمة خوضا، وإذا قعد عنده استنقع استنقاعا، فإن عاده غدوة صلى عليه سبعون ألف ملك إلى أن يمسي، فان عاده عشية صلى عليه سبعون ألف ملك إلى أن يصبح.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 146. It has been reported that the Prophet (a.s) said: Whenever a believer visits one who is sick for the sake of Allah, he will be immersed in mercy totally. When he sits and spends some time with him, he will be soaked in mercy completely. If he visits him in the morning, seventy thousand angels will bless him until he retires in the evening; and if he visits him at night, seventy thousand angels will bless him until he rises in the morning.
